system.description: Open the Veil fully in a 30-foot radius for 1 round. All dead with unfinished business in the area speak simultaneously — every enemy takes 18 + RESONANCE damage, gains Stagger, Silence, and Expose 3. Every ally recovers 14 HP and gains Guard 12. Any ally reduced to 0 HP this round is held at 1 HP by your presence. When this card resolves, you are reduced to 1 HP — the bridge, used fully, costs everything. You cannot be reduced below 1 HP until the start of your next turn.
